requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety & Plug/Voltage Compatibility (220 V / 50 Hz — Type C/F/L)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全及插头/电压兼容性（220 V / 50 Hz — C/F/L型）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全及插頭/電壓相容性（220 V / 50 Hz — C/F/L型）

summary.en: Uruguay operates on 220 V / 50 Hz. The predominant plug type is Type C (two round pins, Europlug); Type F (Schuko) and Type L (three round pins in-line, Italian) are also present. Electrical safety compliance must meet UNIT standards harmonised with IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1 and applicable Mercosur NM electrical safety norms. Devices sold in Uruguay must be compatible with 220 V / 50 Hz; devices designed solely for 110 V / 60 Hz (as required in Colombia or the US) are not suitable. Spanish-language safety markings and instructions are required.
summary.zh: 乌拉圭采用220V/50Hz供电。主要插头类型为C型（两圆脚，欧式插头）；F型（Schuko）和L型（三圆脚直列，意大利式）亦有使用。电气安全合规须满足与IEC 60950-1/IEC 62368-1及相关Mercosur NM电气安全规范协调的UNIT标准。在乌拉圭销售的设备须兼容220V/50Hz；仅适用于110V/60Hz的设备（如哥伦比亚或美国要求）不适用。须提供西班牙语安全标识和说明书。
summary.zht: 烏拉圭採用220V/50Hz供電。主要插頭類型為C型（兩圓腳，歐式插頭）；F型（Schuko）和L型（三圓腳直列，意大利式）亦有使用。電氣安全合規須滿足與IEC 60950-1/IEC 62368-1及相關Mercosur NM電氣安全規範協調的UNIT標準。在烏拉圭銷售的裝置須相容220V/50Hz；僅適用於110V/60Hz的裝置（如哥倫比亞或美國要求）不適用。須提供西班牙語安全標識和說明書。

standards_or_laws: UNIT electrical safety standards (harmonised with IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1)
Mercosur NM harmonised electrical safety norms
UNIT standards for plugs and socket-outlets (IEC 60083 / local Type C/F/L norms)
Uruguay 220 V / 50 Hz national grid standard

summary.en: China uses 220 V / 50 Hz (consistent with Uruguay) but mandates Type I plugs (Australian/Chinese style, AS 3112) for mains-powered consumer devices. Chinese electrical safety is governed by GB 4943.1 (harmonised with IEC 62368-1) and enforced via CCC certification. CCC is not recognised in Uruguay; IEC 62368-1-based test reports from internationally accredited laboratories are more transferable.
summary.zh: 中国采用220V/50Hz（与乌拉圭一致），但对市电供电的消费设备强制要求I型插头（澳大利亚/中国式，AS 3112）。中国电气安全由GB 4943.1（与IEC 62368-1协调）规范，通过CCC认证执行。CCC在乌拉圭不被承认；来自国际认可实验室基于IEC 62368-1的检测报告可移植性更强。
summary.zht: 中國採用220V/50Hz（與烏拉圭一致），但對市電供電的消費裝置強制要求I型插頭（澳大利亞/中國式，AS 3112）。中國電氣安全由GB 4943.1（與IEC 62368-1協調）規範，通過CCC認證執行。CCC在烏拉圭不被承認；來自國際認可實驗室基於IEC 62368-1的檢測報告可移植性更強。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment (harmonised with IEC 62368-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — electrical safety enforcement
Chinese Type I plug standard (GB 1002 / GB 2099 series)

gap.en: Partial gap. The mains voltage (220 V / 50 Hz) matches, reducing adapter or power-supply redesign needs. Key gaps are: (1) plug type — Chinese Type I plugs are not standard in Uruguay; products must ship with Type C adapters or plugs; (2) CCC is not accepted — IEC 62368-1 electrical safety reports from internationally accredited laboratories are required; (3) Spanish-language safety markings and instructions are required.
gap.zh: 部分差距。主电源电压（220V/50Hz）一致，减少了适配器或电源重新设计的需求。主要差距为：(1) 插头类型——中国I型插头在乌拉圭非标准配置，产品须附带C型适配器或插头；(2) CCC不被接受——须提供来自国际认可实验室的IEC 62368-1电气安全报告；(3) 须提供西班牙语安全标识和说明书。
gap.zht: 部分差距。主電源電壓（220V/50Hz）一致，減少了適配器或電源重新設計的需求。主要差距為：(1) 插頭類型——中國I型插頭在烏拉圭非標準配置，產品須附帶C型適配器或插頭；(2) CCC不被接受——須提供來自國際認可實驗室的IEC 62368-1電氣安全報告；(3) 須提供西班牙語安全標識和說明書。

source.publisher: UNIT — Instituto Uruguayo de Normas Técnicas

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uruguay's 220 V / 50 Hz grid is compatible with Chinese power supplies, but plug type (Type C/F/L, not Type I) and electrical safety standards differ. CCC is not recognised; IEC 62368-1-based reports from internationally accredited laboratories are required. Spanish safety markings are mandatory. Verify current UNIT electrical safety standards and Mercosur NM norms with a qualified Uruguayan regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌拉圭220V/50Hz电网与中国电源兼容，但插头类型（C/F/L型，非I型）和电气安全标准不同。CCC不被承认；须提供来自国际认可实验室的IEC 62368-1检测报告。西班牙语安全标识为强制要求。请与合格的乌拉圭监管专业人士核验现行UNIT电气安全标准和Mercosur NM规范。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏拉圭220V/50Hz電網與中國電源相容，但插頭類型（C/F/L型，非I型）和電氣安全標準不同。CCC不被承認；須提供來自國際認可實驗室的IEC 62368-1檢測報告。西班牙語安全標識為強制要求。請與合格的烏拉圭監管專業人士核驗現行UNIT電氣安全標準和Mercosur NM規範。
